name: Baked Corn-Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cut the tops off tomatoes and scoop out seeds and pulp, leaving enough pulp to keep the tomato skin intact. Drain tomatoes upside down.
3. Cook corn as directed on package.
4. Saute onion and green pepper in oil until tender.
5. Add corn, thyme, and basil. Season to taste with black pepper.
6. Heat gently for 1 minute.
7. Fill tomatoes with corn mixture.
8. Place tomatoes in a shallow baking dish and sprinkle tops with bread crumbs.
9. Place 1/4 pat of margarine atop each tomato.
10. Bake 10 to 15 minutes or until heated through.
